database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 3)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?abstract_text ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)<-[:AUTHORED]-(a:Person)
WHERE a.ID = 3
RETURN p.ID AS paper
LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE p.ID IN [600, 0]
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title, abstract_text, c.ID AS conference_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些成员的电子邮件地址。
query_2.sql_query:

  p."ID" AS person_id,

WHERE p."ID" IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
}

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (0, 600)
GROUP BY p."ID"

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?committee rdf:type conf:Committee .
  FILTER (?committee = 1000)
  ?committee conf:has_members ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
}

  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_an_email ?email .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查询ID=1000的委员会的成员ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee)
WHERE c.ID = 1000
RETURN p.ID AS person_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些成员的电子邮件地址。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT h.Person AS person_id, h.VALUE AS email
FROM has_an_email h
WHERE h.Person IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j查询得到的成员ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些成员的名字和姓氏。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
  p."ID" AS person_id,
  p."has_the_first_name",
  p."has_the_last_name"
FROM "Person" p
WHERE p."ID" IN (1800, 1396, 998, 800, 56)

question_results.question: 查找会议ID=7的投稿论文,这些论文的所有审稿意见是是什么,每篇论文的标题和对应的会议是什么

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表,在PostgreSQL中查询每篇论文的详细信息和对应的会议信息。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望54行，实际54行，相似度1.000
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 7)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?paper_title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?paper_title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 7
RETURN p.ID AS paper

query_1.description: 在Neo4j图数据库中查找会议ID=7的所有投稿论文
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (paper:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.ID = 7
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 7)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper (COUNT(?author) AS ?author_count)
WHERE {
    ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
    ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
    ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
    FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
GROUP BY ?paper

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 7
RETURN p.ID AS paper

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 62)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  BIND(STR(?conference) AS ?conference_id)
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 214)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  BIND(STR(?conference) AS ?conference_id)
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)<-[:AUTHORED]-(a:Person)
WHERE a.ID = 214
RETURN p.ID AS paper
LIMIT 10

            WHERE has_text IS NOT NULL AND is_the_1th_part_of IN (217, 216, 215)

WHERE p.ID IN [217, 216, 215]
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title, c.ID AS conference_id
LIMIT 10

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 441)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  ?conference_id rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 499)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  ?conference_id rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)<-[:AUTHORED]-(a:Person)
WHERE a.ID = 499
RETURN p.ID AS paper
LIMIT 10

SELECT is_the_1th_part_of, has_text as abstract_text FROM Abstract
            WHERE has_text IS NOT NULL AND is_the_1th_part_of IN (483)

MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE p.ID IN [483]
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title, c.ID AS conference_id
LIMIT 10

MATCH (a:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
WHERE a.ID = 883
RETURN p.ID AS paper_id

query_2.description: 查询步骤1中获取的论文ID列表对应的摘要
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT ID as abstract_id, has_text as abstract_text FROM Abstract
WHERE has_text IS NOT NULL AND is_the_1th_part_of IN (1747,880,750)

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 893)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

converted_queries.converted_query:

WHERE a.ID = 893
RETURN p.ID AS paper
LIMIT 10

            WHERE has_text IS NOT NULL AND is_the_1th_part_of IN (621)

WHERE p.ID IN [621]
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title, c.ID AS conference_id
LIMIT 10

  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 1679)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?author = 62)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper (COUNT(?author) AS ?author_count)
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
GROUP BY ?paper

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular

The paper "ZSWC-2014" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses.

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为62的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 62
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (63)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular"

"The paper ""ZSWC-2014"" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses."

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (63)
GROUP BY p."ID"

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。

results:

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为424的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 424
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (423)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses.

The paper "ZSWC-2014" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为499的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 499
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (483)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses."

"The paper ""ZSWC-2014"" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (483)
GROUP BY p."ID"

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为852的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 852
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (329)
results:
"The paper ""ZSWC-2014"" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular"

"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p

WHERE p."ID" IN (329)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
The paper "SIGXYZ-2014" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'SIGXYZ-2014' also has its weaknesses.

In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1028的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1028
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (61)
results:
"The paper ""SIGXYZ-2014"" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'SIGXYZ-2014' also has its weaknesses."

"In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (61)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular

The paper "SIGXYZ-2014" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1059的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1059
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (124)
results:
"In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular"

"The paper ""SIGXYZ-2014"" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (124)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
The paper "ZSWC-2014" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses.

In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1095的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1095
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (362)
results:
"The paper ""ZSWC-2014"" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses."

"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (362)
GROUP BY p."ID"

In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1164的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1164
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (1161)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

"The paper ""ZSWC-2015"" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2015' also has its weaknesses."

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (1161)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

The paper "ZSWC-2015" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1294的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1294
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (950)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

"The paper ""ZSWC-2015"" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (950)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses.

The paper "ZSWC-2014" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1338的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1338
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (1334)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2014' the authors discuss ZSWC-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2014' also has its weaknesses."

"The paper ""ZSWC-2014"" is mainly about ZSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2014 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (1334)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

The paper "ZSWC-2015" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1658的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1658
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (122)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

"The paper ""ZSWC-2015"" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (122)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2015' also has its weaknesses.

The paper "ZSWC-2015" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1750的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1750
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (216)
results:
"In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'ZSWC-2015' also has its weaknesses."

"The paper ""ZSWC-2015"" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (216)
GROUP BY p."ID"

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1837的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1837
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (1833)
results:
"The paper ""ZSWC-2015"" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular"

"In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (1833)
GROUP BY p."ID"

2:
In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'SIGXYZ-2014' also has its weaknesses.

The paper "SIGXYZ-2014" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1859的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1859
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (0, 600)
results:
"In their paper 'SIGXYZ-2014' the authors discuss SIGXYZ-2014.
Though apparently a contribution of remarkable novelty, 'SIGXYZ-2014' also has its weaknesses."

"The paper ""SIGXYZ-2014"" is mainly about SIGXYZ-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight SIGXYZ-2014 in particular"

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (0, 600)
GROUP BY p."ID"

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找ID为1915的作者（Person）所著的所有论文（Paper），返回这些论文的ID，限制10条。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE p.ID = 1915
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的审稿意见。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments
FROM Review r
WHERE r.reviews IN (360)
results:
"The paper ""XSWC-2014"" is mainly about XSWC-2014.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.

query_3.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在PostgreSQL的Paper表和contributes表中查询每篇论文的作者数量。
query_3.sql_query:
SELECT
    p."ID" AS paper_id,
    COUNT(c."Person") AS author_count
FROM "Paper" p
LEFT JOIN contributes c ON p."ID" = c."Conference_document"
WHERE p."ID" IN (360)
GROUP BY p."ID"

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查找既是委员会成员又是论文作者的人员，返回他们的ID、姓名。
query_1.sql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS person_id,
  p."has_the_first_name" AS first_name,
  p."has_the_last_name" AS last_name
FROM "Person" p
WHERE p."is_Committee_member" = TRUE
AND p."is_Conference_contributor" = TRUE;

query_2.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的人员ID列表，在MySQL中查询这些人员的邮箱地址。
query_2.sql_query:
SELECT Person AS person_id,
  VALUE AS email
FROM has_an_email
WHERE Person IN (141,558,1599,158,1120,1815,585,800,6,509,1464,1396,313,98,1644,403,2185,142);

query_3.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的人员ID列表，在Neo4j中查询这些人撰写的所有论文信息。
query_3.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[r:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE author.ID IN [6,98,141,142,158,313,403,509,558,585,800,1120,1396,1464,1599,1644,1815,2185]
RETURN author.ID AS author_id,
  author.first_name AS author_first_name,
  author.last_name AS author_last_name,
  paper.ID AS paper_id,
  paper.title AS paper_title
ORDER BY author.ID, paper.ID;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望163行，实际163行，相似度1.000
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 256)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?author ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?author .
  ?author rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?author conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?author conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 256
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为256的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 256 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;

query_3.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。
query_3.cypher_query: MATCH (paper:Paper)<-[r:AUTHORED]-(author:Person) WHERE paper.ID IN [36,40,52,61,65,100,124,188,190,232,253,268,291,299,319,343,347,377,385,404,452,479,488,498,513,547,550,565,591,598,599,600,601,602,603,604,605,606,607,608,609,610,611,612,613,614,615,616,617,618,619,620,621,622,623,624,625,626,627,628,629] RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, author.ID AS author_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, author.is_Reviewer AS is_reviewer;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望144行，实际144行，相似度1.000

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 7)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 7
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为7的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 7 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;

query_3.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。
query_3.cypher_query: MATCH (paper:Paper)<-[r:AUTHORED]-(author:Person) WHERE paper.ID IN [0, 9, 25, 50, 53, 63, 75, 77, 113, 119, 194, 226, 233, 265, 286, 288, 302, 322, 329, 333, 351, 362, 388, 423, 483, 485, 505, 532, 541, 543, 645, 716, 791, 826, 835, 873, 943, 1025, 1069, 1094, 1119, 1124, 1156, 1195, 1216, 1236, 1309, 1334, 1505, 1635, 1689, 1747, 1828, 1973] RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, author.ID AS author_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, author.is_Reviewer AS is_reviewer;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望125行，实际125行，相似度1.000
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 470)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 470
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

query_3.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。
query_3.cypher_query: MATCH (paper:Paper)<-[r:AUTHORED]-(author:Person) WHERE paper.ID IN [32, 55, 81, 111, 127, 136, 152, 186, 215, 229, 247, 262, 346, 457, 464, 469, 521, 643, 648, 674, 703, 705, 731, 745, 748, 813, 839, 853, 877, 880, 894, 924, 925, 926, 927, 928, 929, 930, 931, 932, 933, 934, 935, 936, 937, 938, 939] RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, author.ID AS author_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, author.is_Reviewer AS is_reviewer;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望120行，实际120行，相似度1.000
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 69)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 69
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

query_3.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。
query_3.cypher_query: MATCH (paper:Paper)<-[r:AUTHORED]-(author:Person) WHERE paper.ID IN [47, 67, 102, 110, 139, 151, 154, 178, 202, 217, 278, 306, 348, 382, 396, 414, 432, 450, 460, 496, 587, 633, 644, 647, 649, 665, 702, 747, 750, 796, 812, 815, 830, 879, 957, 1111, 1113, 1206, 1267, 1302, 1418, 1588, 1706, 1778, 1806] RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, author.ID AS author_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, author.is_Reviewer AS is_reviewer;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望110行，实际107行，相似度0.973
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 18)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 18
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .

repair_details.final_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 18)
}

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
repair_details.final_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
repair_details.final_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为18的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 18 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;

query_2.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的评审意见。
query_2.sql_query: SELECT r.ID AS review_id, r.reviews AS paper_id, r.has_detailed_comments AS comments FROM Review r WHERE r.reviews IN (404,752,501,1819,1155,218,397,375,691,2108,537,861,907,476,462,157,916,551,534,689,1242,1129,316,572,721,1548,179,360,942,440,16,658,12,1018,407,242,208,1325,822,326,260) AND r.has_detailed_comments IS NOT NULL;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望139行，实际0行，相似度0.000
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 163)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?conference IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 163
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为163的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 163 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;

query_3.description: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。
query_3.cypher_query: MATCH (paper:Paper)<-[r:AUTHORED]-(author:Person) WHERE paper.ID IN [15,30,91,116,122,133,161,175,205,216,227,250,281,349,357,411,430,495,503,512,553,567,583,637,640,667,669,694,768,896,913,950,962,1037,1097,1147,1157,1161,1169,1188,1214,1245,1366,1393,1551,1637,1660,1671,1704,1736,1833,1918] RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, author.ID AS author_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, author.is_Reviewer AS is_reviewer;

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据PostgreSQL返回的论文ID列表，在Neo4j中查询每篇论文的作者信息，包括作者ID、姓名、是否为评审人。

comparison_details.reason: 第三个子查询行数比较: 期望181行，实际181行，相似度1.000
comparison_details.note: 只比较行数，不关注列数和具体内容

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  FILTER (?conference = 86)
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?comments
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
WHERE c.ID = 86
RETURN p.ID AS paper, p.title AS title

query_1.description: 在PostgreSQL中查询ID为86的会议（Conference）提交的所有论文（Paper），返回论文ID和标题。
query_1.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT p."ID" AS paper_id, p."has_a_paper_title" AS paper_title FROM "Paper" p WHERE p."is_submitted_at" = 86 AND p."has_a_paper_title" IS NOT NULL;
